title: botrychium ternatum f. intermedium
intro: Botrychium ternatum f. intermedium, also known as the intermediate-leafed rattlesnake fern, is a rare and unique species of plant that belongs to the family Ophioglossaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through various methods, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to limited scientific research.
